_note: These are the assumptions Claude uses when generating weekly training plans. To change a value, ask Claude Code or Cowork to update this file and the script will reflect it on the next Sunday run.

progressive_overload.hold_trigger: Any set missed by more than 2 reps
progressive_overload.reduce_trigger: More than 20% of total reps missed across the session

phases._note: Phase labels are passed to Claude as context and influence volume/intensity suggestions, not hard-coded numbers.
